## State Surfaces

| Skill | Reads | Writes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| [`caveman`](caveman/SKILL.md) | current conversation | - |
| [`compare`](compare/SKILL.md) | requested files, skills, codebases, branches, +2 | state/collab/compare-history.md |
| [`context-surface-audit`](context-surface-audit/SKILL.md) | AGENTS.md, claude/CLAUDE.md, skills/*/SKILL.md, skills/*/skill.toml, +2 | - |
| [`daily-review`](daily-review/SKILL.md) | state/collab/roadmap.md | state/collab/daily-reviews/, state/collab/roadmap.md |
| [`devon-branding`](devon-branding/SKILL.md) | requested design files, references/devon-brand-standards.md | requested UI, theme, token, document, presentation, or review artifact |
| [`excalidraw-diagram`](excalidraw-diagram/SKILL.md) | requested docs, code, roadmap/workflow notes, optional existing .excalidraw files | .excalidraw source files, rendered image files |
| [`execution-review`](execution-review/SKILL.md) | state/collab/execution-reviews/ | state/collab/execution-reviews/ |
| [`explain`](explain/SKILL.md) | requested code, docs, files, provided context | - |
| [`focus`](focus/SKILL.md) | state/collab/roadmap.md | state/collab/roadmap.md, state/collab/morning/ |
| [`grill-me`](grill-me/SKILL.md) | docs/artifacts/<feature>/ | - |
| [`handoff-research-pro`](handoff-research-pro/SKILL.md) | current chat intent, git status, git diff, changed files, +2 | docs/handoffs/<slug>-research-pro-review.md |
| [`idea`](idea/SKILL.md) | state/ideas/<slug>/ | state/ideas/<slug>/ |
| [`improve-agents-md`](improve-agents-md/SKILL.md) | repo docs, scripts, manifests, existing AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md | target instruction markdown files |
| [`init-epic`](init-epic/SKILL.md) | user-provided repo/workspace context, existing sibling repos | coordination workspace files |
| [`morning-sync`](morning-sync/SKILL.md) | state/collab/roadmap.md, state/collab/execution-reviews/ | state/collab/roadmap.md, state/collab/morning/ |
| [`review`](review/SKILL.md) | git diff, changed files, PR context, repository tests/docs | review comments only when explicitly requested |
| [`spec-new-feature`](spec-new-feature/SKILL.md) | docs/UBIQUITOUS_LANGUAGE.md, state/ideas/<slug>/, state/collab/roadmap.md | docs/artifacts/<feature>/ |
| [`ubiquitous-language`](ubiquitous-language/SKILL.md) | docs/UBIQUITOUS_LANGUAGE.md | docs/UBIQUITOUS_LANGUAGE.md |
| [`visual-reasoning`](visual-reasoning/SKILL.md) | requested files, docs, code, workflows, +2 | optional diagram artifacts through excalidraw-diagram |
| [`wiki`](wiki/SKILL.md) | detected wiki directory, schema.md, index.md, log.md, +2 | wiki files under selected wiki root |

## Skill Details

### caveman

- Use when: Ultra-compressed communication mode. Cuts token usage ~75% by speaking like caveman while keeping full technical accuracy. Supports intensity levels: lite, full (default), ultra, wenyan-lite, wenyan-full, wenyan-ultra. Use when user says "caveman mode", "talk like caveman", "use caveman", "less tokens", "be brief", or invokes $caveman. Also auto-triggers when token efficiency is requested.
- Targets: `codex`
- Entry points: default `SKILL.md`
- Explicit invokes: `caveman`, `$caveman`
- Implicit invoke: `true`
- Parents: none
- Children: none
- Uses format from: none
- Reads: `current conversation`
- Writes: none
- Delegates: none
- Handoffs: none
- Inputs: `terse communication request`, `$caveman invocation`
- Outputs: `compressed chat response`
- State reads: none
- State writes: none
- Tools: none
- Read next: [`skills/caveman/SKILL.md`](caveman/SKILL.md)

### compare

- Use when: Compare two files, skills, codebases, branches, workflows, configs, or structured artifacts side-by-side. Uses explain-style visuals and produces a diff-focused analysis with divergences, shared DNA, and steal lists.
- Targets: `claude`, `codex`
- Entry points: default `SKILL.md`
- Explicit invokes: `compare`
- Implicit invoke: `true`
- Parents: `visual-reasoning`
- Children: `excalidraw-diagram`
- Uses format from: `explain`, `excalidraw-diagram`
- Reads: `requested files`, `skills`, `codebases`, `branches`, `workflows`, `configs`
- Writes: `state/collab/compare-history.md`, `optional diagram artifacts`
- Delegates: none
- Handoffs: `excalidraw-diagram`
- Inputs: `comparison request`, `two or more structured artifacts`
- Outputs: `side-by-side comparison`, `diff-focused analysis`
- State reads: none
- State writes: `state/collab/compare-history.md`
- Tools: `git`, `rg`
- Read next: [`skills/compare/SKILL.md`](compare/SKILL.md)

### context-surface-audit

- Use when: Audit dot-agent context surfaces for word counts, duplicate anchors, runtime install shape, and skill manifest schema coverage without reading transcript content.
- Targets: `claude`, `codex`
- Entry points: default `SKILL.md`
- Explicit invokes: `context-surface-audit`, `context audit`
- Implicit invoke: `true`
- Parents: `spec-new-feature`, `execution-review`
- Children: `execution-review`
- Uses format from: none
- Reads: `AGENTS.md`, `claude/CLAUDE.md`, `skills/*/SKILL.md`, `skills/*/skill.toml`, `~/.codex`, `~/.claude`
- Writes: none
- Delegates: none
- Handoffs: `execution-review`, `spec-new-feature`
- Inputs: `context budget review`, `harness reduction audit`, `manifest coverage check`
- Outputs: `text or json structural audit`
- State reads: none
- State writes: none
- Tools: `python3`
- Read next: [`skills/context-surface-audit/SKILL.md`](context-surface-audit/SKILL.md)

### daily-review

- Use when: Close the human daily loop from the roadmap. Use when the user wants a day-end review, recap, completed-row drainage, or a human-readable record of what changed today.
- Targets: `codex`
- Entry points: default `SKILL.md`
- Explicit invokes: `daily-review`, `day-end review`
- Implicit invoke: `true`
- Parents: `focus`
- Children: `focus`, `morning-sync`, `spec-new-feature`, `excalidraw-diagram`
- Uses format from: `excalidraw-diagram`
- Reads: `state/collab/roadmap.md`, `user-provided PR/review notes`
- Writes: `state/collab/daily-reviews/`
- Delegates: `focus`
- Handoffs: `morning-sync`, `focus`
- Inputs: `day-end review request`, `completed roadmap rows`
- Outputs: `daily review packet`, `completed-row drainage summary`
- State reads: `state/collab/roadmap.md`
- State writes: `state/collab/daily-reviews/`, `state/collab/roadmap.md`
- Tools: none
- Read next: [`skills/daily-review/SKILL.md`](daily-review/SKILL.md)

### devon-branding

- Use when: Devon Energy brand guidelines for colors, typography, logo usage, voice/tone, and visual identity. Use when creating or reviewing UI components, styling, themes, dashboards, presentations, documents, design tokens, or other Devon-branded design work.
- Targets: `claude`, `codex`

### excalidraw-diagram

- Use when: Create and revise Excalidraw diagrams for architecture, workflow, research, planning, and documentation tasks. Use when the user asks for an Excalidraw drawing, visual map, workflow diagram, or a rendered diagram artifact in docs.
- Targets: `claude`, `codex`

- Implicit invoke: `true`
- Parents: `visual-reasoning`
- Children: none
- Uses format from: none

- Writes: `.excalidraw source files`, `rendered image files`
- Delegates: none
- Handoffs: none
- Inputs: `diagram request`, `workflow or architecture explanation`
- Outputs: `Excalidraw source`, `rendered PNG`
- State reads: none
- State writes: none

### execution-review

- Use when: Review recent Codex and Claude Code sessions to diagnose response fit, skill usage, workflow efficiency, verification discipline, and recurring failures from local runtime artifacts.
- Targets: `claude`, `codex`
- Entry points: default `SKILL.md`, Claude `claude/SKILL.md`, Codex `codex/SKILL.md`
- Explicit invokes: `execution-review`, `execution review`
- Implicit invoke: `true`
- Parents: `context-surface-audit`
- Children: `excalidraw-diagram`
- Uses format from: `excalidraw-diagram`
- Reads: `Codex/Claude session logs`, `execution-review evidence/history`, `PR signals`, `roadmap rows`, `Hermes findings`
- Writes: `state/collab/execution-reviews/`
- Delegates: none
- Handoffs: `morning-sync`, `daily-review`, `spec-new-feature`, `focus`, `review`
- Inputs: `forensic execution review`, `workflow diagnosis`, `weekly retrospective`
- Outputs: `execution review report`, `session-quality findings`, `workflow recommendations`
- State reads: `state/collab/execution-reviews/`
- State writes: `state/collab/execution-reviews/`
- Tools: `python3`
- Read next: [`skills/execution-review/SKILL.md`](execution-review/SKILL.md)

### explain

- Use when: Visual-first explanations of code, concepts, architectures, or systems. Always leads with an ASCII diagram, table, or tree before prose. Automatically selects the right visual format based on the question type. Use when the user types "/explain" followed by a topic or question.
- Targets: `claude`, `codex`
- Entry points: default `SKILL.md`
- Explicit invokes: `explain`
- Implicit invoke: `true`
- Parents: `visual-reasoning`, `compare`
- Children: `excalidraw-diagram`
- Uses format from: `excalidraw-diagram`
- Reads: `requested code`, `docs`, `files`, `provided context`
- Writes: none
- Delegates: none
- Handoffs: none
- Inputs: `explanation request`, `code or concept`
- Outputs: `visual-first explanation`
- State reads: none
- State writes: none
- Tools: none
- Read next: [`skills/explain/SKILL.md`](explain/SKILL.md)

### focus

- Use when: Mutate and inspect the daily roadmap/focus board. Use when the user wants to set focus, add or reorder roadmap rows, mark work complete, drop/park work, trim WIP, or decide whether a roadmap row should stay lightweight or move into deeper feature planning.
- Targets: `codex`
- Entry points: default `SKILL.md`
- Explicit invokes: `focus`
- Implicit invoke: `true`
- Parents: `morning-sync`
- Children: `idea`, `spec-new-feature`, `excalidraw-diagram`
- Uses format from: `excalidraw-diagram`
- Reads: `state/collab/roadmap.md`
- Writes: `state/collab/roadmap.md`, `state/collab/morning/`
- Delegates: none
- Handoffs: `morning-sync`, `daily-review`, `spec-new-feature`
- Inputs: `roadmap mutation request`, `focus review request`, `next control surface decision`
- Outputs: `roadmap summary`, `roadmap mutation`, `control surface recommendation`
- State reads: `state/collab/roadmap.md`
- State writes: `state/collab/roadmap.md`, `state/collab/morning/`
- Tools: `python3`
- Read next: [`skills/focus/SKILL.md`](focus/SKILL.md)

### grill-me

- Use when: Pressure-test a plan or design one question at a time until the risky branches are resolved. Use when the user asks to be grilled, wants a plan stress-tested, or when `spec-new-feature` reaches a checkpoint with unresolved tradeoffs.
- Targets: `claude`, `codex`
- Entry points: default `SKILL.md`
- Explicit invokes: `grill-me`
- Implicit invoke: `true`
- Parents: `spec-new-feature`
- Children: none
- Uses format from: none
- Reads: `current plan`, `design notes`, `feature artifacts`, `repo docs/code`
- Writes: none
- Delegates: none
- Handoffs: none
- Inputs: `plan stress-test request`, `design stress-test request`, `checkpoint pressure-test request`
- Outputs: `pressure-test questions`, `resolved risky branches`, `recommended answers`
- State reads: `docs/artifacts/<feature>/`
- State writes: none
- Tools: none
- Read next: [`skills/grill-me/SKILL.md`](grill-me/SKILL.md)

### handoff-research-pro

- Use when: Create a single Markdown handoff packet for ChatGPT Research Pro or another remote-only external reviewer. Use when the user asks to package context, summarize goals/direction, prepare an outside review brief, or hand off local work where the reviewer has repo access but not this machine/runtime.
- Targets: `claude`, `codex`
- Entry points: default `SKILL.md`
- Explicit invokes: `handoff-research-pro`
- Implicit invoke: `true`
- Parents: none
- Children: `review`, `compare`, `excalidraw-diagram`
- Uses format from: `review`
- Reads: `current chat intent`, `git status`, `git diff`, `changed files`, `validation output`, `repo docs`
- Writes: `docs/handoffs/<slug>-research-pro-review.md`
- Delegates: none
- Handoffs: none
- Inputs: `remote review brief request`, `handoff packet request`
- Outputs: `docs/handoffs/<slug>-research-pro-review.md`
- State reads: none
- State writes: none
- Tools: `git`, `rg`

### idea

- Use when: Long-horizon idea incubation — capture braindumps, refine concepts, develop technical architecture, write leadership-ready decision briefs, bridge mature ideas into /spec-new-feature, and explicitly promote mature ideas into roadmap rows when requested. If the idea first needs a new multi-repo coordination workspace, route through init-epic before feature planning. When an idea appears ready for execution, remind the user that promotion is available so they do not have to remember the command themselves. Use when the user types "/idea" to list ideas, start a new one, refine an existing one, work on technical architecture, write a brief, write a high-level spec, create an optional plan, or promote it into the roadmap. Sub-commands: (none), new, exec, brief, spec, plan, promote.
- Targets: `claude`, `codex`
- Entry points: default `SKILL.md`
- Explicit invokes: `idea`, `/idea`
- Implicit invoke: `true`
- Parents: `morning-sync`, `focus`
- Children: `spec-new-feature`, `init-epic`, `excalidraw-diagram`
- Uses format from: `excalidraw-diagram`
- Reads: `state/ideas/<slug>/`
- Writes: `state/ideas/<slug>/idea.md`, `state/ideas/<slug>/brief.md`, `state/ideas/<slug>/spec.md`, `state/ideas/<slug>/plan.md`
- Delegates: none
- Handoffs: `init-epic`, `spec-new-feature`
- Inputs: `idea braindump`, `idea refinement request`, `idea brief/spec/plan/promote command`
- Outputs: `idea artifact`, `brief`, `high-level spec`, `optional plan`, `promotion recommendation`
- State reads: `state/ideas/<slug>/`
- State writes: `state/ideas/<slug>/`
- Tools: none
- Read next: [`skills/idea/SKILL.md`](idea/SKILL.md)

### init-epic

- Use when: Bootstrap a cross-repo coordination workspace using the toolkit-rigby pattern: root AGENTS.md, README.md, gitignored sibling repos, inventory docs, and optional repo cloning. Use this before focus/spec-new-feature when the user first needs a multi-repo coordination workspace.
- Targets: `claude`, `codex`
- Entry points: default `SKILL.md`
- Explicit invokes: `init-epic`
- Implicit invoke: `true`
- Parents: `idea`, `focus`, `spec-new-feature`
- Children: `spec-new-feature`, `excalidraw-diagram`
- Uses format from: `excalidraw-diagram`
- Reads: `user-provided repo/workspace context`, `existing sibling repos`
- Writes: `coordination workspace files`
- Delegates: none
- Handoffs: `focus`, `spec-new-feature`
- Inputs: `multi-repo coordination workspace request`
- Outputs: `coordination workspace scaffold`, `repo inventory stubs`
- State reads: none
- State writes: none
- Tools: `git`
- Read next: [`skills/init-epic/SKILL.md`](init-epic/SKILL.md)

- Use when: Run the day-start operating loop from the human roadmap. Use when the user asks what to work on this morning, wants a daily sync, or wants a concise summary of what should happen next.

### review

- Use when: Review the current branch's diff for bugs, security issues, and design problems. If a PR exists, also investigates unresolved reviewer comments. Accepts optional extension filters (e.g. `/review sol go`, `/review ts tsx`). Default is all changed files.
- Targets: `claude`, `codex`
- Entry points: default `SKILL.md`, Claude `SKILL.md`, Codex `codex/SKILL.md`
- Explicit invokes: `review`
- Implicit invoke: `true`
- Parents: none
- Children: `excalidraw-diagram`
- Uses format from: `excalidraw-diagram`
- Reads: `git diff`, `changed files`, `PR context`, `repository tests/docs`
- Writes: `review comments only when explicitly requested`
- Delegates: none
- Handoffs: none
- Inputs: `code review request`, `PR review request`, `diff review request`
- Outputs: `severity-ordered findings`, `reviewer thread verdicts`
- State reads: none
- State writes: none
- Tools: `git`, `gh`
- Read next: [`skills/review/SKILL.md`](review/SKILL.md)
